====Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire====
=====Capture tutorial=====
[[Norman]] loans this Pokémon to Wally to show him how to catch Pokémon.
{{Party
| background = {{tcg grass color light}}
| border = {{tcg grass color}}
| headcolor = CED8F6
| sprite = VSWally.png
| size = 150px
| prize = none
| name = Wally
| location = Hoenn Route 102
| locationname = Route 102
| game = ORAS
| pokemon = 1
}}

| ndex = 0263
| pokemon = Zigzagoon
| gender = female
| level = 7
| type1 = Normal
| ability = Pickup
| ability2 = Gluttony
| move1 = Tackle | move1type = Normal | move1cat = Physical
| move2 = Growl | move2type = Normal | move2cat = Status
| move3 = Tail Whip | move3type = Normal | move3cat = Status
| move4 = Sand Attack | move4type = Ground | move4cat = Status
}}
{{Party/end}}
